Uses of Class
neqsim.process.safety.reaction.RunawayReactionAnalyzer

Packages that use RunawayReactionAnalyzer
Package
Description
neqsim.process.safety.reaction
 

  • Uses of RunawayReactionAnalyzer in neqsim.process.safety.reaction

    Methods in neqsim.process.safety.reaction that return RunawayReactionAnalyzer
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    RunawayReactionAnalyzer
    RunawayReactionAnalyzer.setAcceptableMargin(double marginK)
    Set the acceptable margin between the maximum-allowable temperature and MTSR.
    RunawayReactionAnalyzer
    RunawayReactionAnalyzer.setActivationEnergy(double value, String unit)
    Set the apparent activation energy used for the adiabatic time-to-maximum-rate.
    RunawayReactionAnalyzer
    RunawayReactionAnalyzer.setFluid(SystemInterface fluid)
    Supply a fluid used to derive the total mass and/or specific heat when they are not set explicitly.
    RunawayReactionAnalyzer
    RunawayReactionAnalyzer.setGassySystem(boolean gassy)
    Declare whether the reaction generates permanent (non-condensable) gas.
    RunawayReactionAnalyzer
    RunawayReactionAnalyzer.setInitialHeatReleaseRate(double value, String unit)
    Set the specific heat-release rate at the process temperature, used for the adiabatic time-to-maximum-rate.
    RunawayReactionAnalyzer
    RunawayReactionAnalyzer.setLimitingReactantMoles(double moles)
    Set the number of moles of the limiting reactant available to react.
    RunawayReactionAnalyzer
    RunawayReactionAnalyzer.setMaxAllowableTemperature(double value, String unit)
    Set the maximum-allowable temperature (decomposition onset or material limit) used as the rating.
    RunawayReactionAnalyzer
    RunawayReactionAnalyzer.setProcessTemperature(double value, String unit)
    Set the initial process temperature.
    RunawayReactionAnalyzer
    RunawayReactionAnalyzer.setReactionEnthalpy(double value, String unit)
    Set the molar reaction enthalpy of the limiting reactant.
    RunawayReactionAnalyzer
    RunawayReactionAnalyzer.setSpecificHeat(double value, String unit)
    Set the specific heat of the reacting mixture explicitly.
    RunawayReactionAnalyzer
    RunawayReactionAnalyzer.setTotalMass(double value, String unit)
    Set the total reacting mass explicitly.
